case_title: FENTRESS HILL VS. CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $50.00 FILED BY HILL, FENTRESS AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION SANDMAN, MALINDA SANDMAN, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00, DEFENDANTS MALINDA SANDMAN AND CHRISTOPHER SANDMAN ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COURT FINDS THAT HOA BOARD FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1363(H) BY GIVING NOTICE OF THE FINE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE BOARD MEETING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-26-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDMAN, MALINDA
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-26-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CHRISTOPHER SANDMAN, AND MALINDA SANDMAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-06-2009 AT 8:30AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-26-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDMAN, CHRISTOPHER
